meta.data_cutoff: 期中考後（含期中成績，final 待 ~14 天後產出）
meta.risk_level_policy: risk_level_final combines BAS/QMI and XGBoost: same level -> that level; one level apart -> the higher one (unchanged from v1.3); two levels apart (HIGH vs LOW, the sharpest disagreement) -> downgraded to MEDIUM with model_disagreement=true / W-MODEL-DISAGREE instead of auto-HIGH, flagged for manual review rather than auto-escalated. risk_level_bas preserves the BAS-only level.
